name: wb-country-dashboard
_note: Many headline indicators for one country (latest + sparkline each). Fuzz_cases land on the PRE-NETWORK ISO-3 validation branch so NO outbound call is made. The XSS probe on 'country' also fails the regex pre-network; a hostile alias in the 'indicators' array would be blocked by the per-alias format guard before any fetch. NEVER no_db (no DB).
